hero.title: Simple, transparent pricing
hero.description: Choose the perfect plan for your business. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for small businesses getting started with digital marketing

plans.name: Professional
plans.description: Ideal for growing businesses needing advanced features

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For large organizations requiring full-scale solutions

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.

faqs.question: Can I change plans later?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.

faqs.question: What happens after my trial ends?
faqs.answer: After your trial ends, you can choose to subscribe to any of our plans or your account will be automatically downgraded to a limited free version.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses that trust our platform
